body:
Hi Amara, hope you're having a good weekend — wanted to follow up on our conversation from last week about [GreenPulse](greenpulse.io)'s Series A raise. We've had a couple of strong term sheets come in, which is exciting, but I'd honestly rather have [Halfway Capital](halfway.vc) at the table given your team's track record in climate infrastructure. The core ask is whether you'd be open to a deeper diligence session sometime this week — we can walk you through the updated grid-edge demand forecasting model and the new partnership we just signed with a Tier 1 utility. Let me know what your calendar looks like and I'll make it work on our end.

Best,
Dev
